title: Junior Business Development Manager at Liases Foras

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Liases Foras
jsonLd.description:
Liases Foras, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Liases Foras:
Liases Foras is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liases Foras!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
